'''âz-g-k-r''' ('''kazagkeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jimjam|jimjam]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jimjam|jimjam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-g-k-r
|-
! Lemma
| kazagkeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizagkeroko|thizagkeroko]] || [[word:jizagkeroko|jizagkeroko]] || [[word:shizagkeroko|shizagkeroko]] || [[word:kizagkeroko|kizagkeroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzagkeroko|thĂŠzagkeroko]] || [[word:jĂŠzagkeroko|jĂŠzagkeroko]] || [[word:shĂŠzagkeroko|shĂŠzagkeroko]] || [[word:kĂŠzagkeroko|kĂŠzagkeroko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazagkeroko|thazagkeroko]] || [[word:jazagkeroko|jazagkeroko]] || [[word:shazagkeroko|shazagkeroko]] || [[word:kazagkeroko|kazagkeroko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
